title: Aether Valkyrie Sky Villages
description: Makes Sky Villages generate with Aether blocks in the Aether alongisde custom Valkyrie NPCs
body:
This datapack is an addon for Sky Villages, The Aether, Aether: Redux, Deep Aether, and Easy NPC. It restricts sky village generation to the Aether dimension and replaces vanilla blocks used in the villages with blocks from The Aether, Aether: Redux, and Deep Aether. The villages spawn high in the sky in any Aether and Aether addon biome. 

Thanks the to Easy NPC mod, the villages also include custom Valkyrie NPCs. These NPCs spawn in sky villages and attack monsters. There are three different variants: Valkyrie Warriors who wield the Valkyrie Lance, Valkyrie Rangers who wield the Phoenix Bow, and Valkyrie Marksmen who wield the Subzero Crossbow. Valkyrie NPCs can be traded with like Villagers using Golden Amber. Each variant of Valkyrie NPCs have their own trades. 

Because this is a datapack, I would recommend using a mod like Global Packs to apply it to every world.

**Important Note:** this is not simply an addon for Sky Villages and The Aether, it also requires Aether: Redux, Deep Aether, and Easy NPC to work. Make sure you have all of these mods and their respective dependencies installed. Because the Valkyrie NPCs use a custom skin, you will need to place this skin in your config for Easy NPC. I have included the full config folder in the zip file so you can just drag and drop.
